name: Saferide Services
recent_news: No M&A or news identified. Generic name overlaps with multiple unrelated 'SafeRide' brands (SafeRide Health, SafeRide & Delivery, Safe Ride Services Inc. in Phoenix); Scottsdale Doubletree Ranch Rd Suite 110 address is consistent with a small NEMT operator rather than a yellow-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Poor fit for Summit tuck-in: appears to be small NEMT/paratransit (special_needs=1, school=0) with no evidence of yellow school bus contracts or district relationships. Generic brand and suite-style HQ suggest sub-scale. Pass unless contact reveals SPED school-route exposure.

name: Mark's Transportation
districts_or_customers: Milford-area MA school districts (SPED/7D van routes)
recent_news: No M&A activity. Operates as a Massachusetts 7D-certified small van carrier transporting students and adults; reviews emphasize on-time, safety-focused service for special education riders.
fit_notes: Marginal tuck-in: classic small MA 7D van operator (SPED/McKinney-Vento style routes), single-owner, ~18 employees. Too small to move the needle for Summit on its own but a logical bolt-on to a MA platform; succession-friendly given founder-led structure since 2010.

name: J & L's Medical Transport LLC
recent_news: No web footprint located; not found in SCDHHS Modivcare network materials or SC Department of Education transportation contractor lists. Name and 'Medical Transport' designation indicate NEMT focus rather than school-bus contracting.
fit_notes: Poor fit: appears to be a sub-scale NEMT operator (special_needs=1, school=0) with no website, no identified principals, and no evidence of yellow-bus or district contracts. Skip unless a SC-platform operator confirms SPED route overlap.

name: Garden State Medical Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: Bergen, Passaic, Morris, Essex and Hudson County NJ riders (Medicaid/Modivcare network, private pay seniors)
recent_news: No M&A activity. Founded 1994; long-standing Northern NJ senior and non-emergency medical transportation provider; secondary Hackensack office in addition to Dumont HQ.
fit_notes: Poor strategic fit: NEMT/senior transport business, not a NJ school-bus contractor (absent from NJDOE 2022-23 contractor code list). Tag 'special_needs' here reflects medical paratransit, not SPED school routing. Pass unless Summit pursues a NJ paratransit/SPED-van adjacency.

name: Heritage Rides Inc
districts_or_customers: Orange County CA NEMT riders (Medi-Cal/MCO network)
recent_news: No M&A activity. Registered as non-emergency medical transport (NPI van), DOT 3786788; provides wheelchair, gurney, and ambulatory NEMT in the Fullerton/Orange County area.
fit_notes: Poor fit: pure NEMT (wheelchair/gurney/ambulatory), founded 2021, ~13 employees, no Fullerton SD or other district contract evidence. Not a school-bus tuck-in; succession unlikely given recent founding. Pass.
